name: Abode
short_description: Abode is an escape room puzzle game. You will have to find, combine and utilize tools and furniture in the room to unveil all its secrets.
detailed_description:
Be a vigilant detective! Explore and investigate every corner and detail of the worn down apartment.

Find objects or items to inspect, search through boxes, drawers and furniture.
Repair broken equipment or utilize items and furniture in the room in order to unveil all it's secrets.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

The gameplay is approximately 1hr long depending on how fast you solve the puzzles and how much you rush.

VR Exclusive.
